description: Get an ArgoCD Application by name
name: argocd_application_get
title: ArgoCD: Get Application

description: List ArgoCD Applications in the current cluster

labelSelector.description: Optional Kubernetes label selector to filter Applications (e.g. 'app=myapp')

namespace.description: Namespace to list Applications from. If not provided, lists from all namespaces

name: argocd_application_list
title: ArgoCD: List Applications

description: Get an ArgoCD AppProject by name
name: argocd_appproject_get
title: ArgoCD: Get AppProject

description: List ArgoCD AppProjects in the current cluster

labelSelector.description: Optional Kubernetes label selector to filter AppProjects (e.g. 'app=myapp')

namespace.description: Namespace to list AppProjects from. If not provided, lists from all namespaces

name: argocd_appproject_list
title: ArgoCD: List AppProjects

description: Get an ArgoCD instance (ArgoCD operator CR) by name
name: argocd_instance_get
title: ArgoCD: Get Instance

description: List ArgoCD instances (ArgoCD operator CRs) in the current cluster

labelSelector.description: Optional Kubernetes label selector to filter ArgoCD instances (e.g. 'app=myapp')

namespace.description: Namespace to list ArgoCD instances from. If not provided, lists from all namespaces

name: argocd_instance_list
title: ArgoCD: List Instances
